subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 440728127 / 141220020 is not a GRB
body:
P.Jenke (UAH) report on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 440728127 / 141220020
at 00:28:44.18 UT on the 20th of December 2014, initially classified as
a GRB, is in fact due to a X2.0 solar flare."
